[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 011100100 4
1 011100000 3
2 001000100 2
3 011011100 5
4 010000000 1
5 001000100 2
6 011011001 5
7 010000100 2

01 001001001 3
12 000010000 1

34 000111001 4
45 000000000 a
56 000011110 4
67 010100000 2
70 000000000 a

73 000000100 1
